queries: إن الله كتب مقادير الخلائق قبل أن يخلق السماوات والأرض بخمسين ألف سنة وكان عرشه على الماء
وَلَا تَقْتُلُوا أَنْفُسَكُمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ بِكُمْ رَحِيمًا
وَلَا تَقْرَبُوا الزِّنَى إِنَّهُ كَانَ فَاحِشَةً وَسَاءَ سَبِيلًا
وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِ نَفْسُهُ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ الْوَرِيدِ
ولقد خلقنا الانسان ونعلم ما توسوس به نفسه ونحن اقرب اليه من حبل الوريد
ولا تقتلوا انفسكم ان الله كان بكم رحيما
ولا تقربوا الزنا انه كان فاحشة وساء سبيلا
إن الله كتب مقادير الخلائق قبل أن يخلق السماوات والأرض بخمسين ألف سنة وكان عرشه على الماء

import re, json, textwrap, unicodedata, sys, os, pprint

path = "/mnt/data/file-UqerfbCYMJkXREqHKruHcz-text_to_analyse.txt"
text = open(path,'r',encoding='utf-8').read()

print(repr(text[:120]))
print("---")
print(text)

import re
start_phrase = "إن الله كتب مقادير الخلائق"
start_idx = text.find(start_phrase)
start_idx, text[start_idx-30:start_idx+80]

end_idx = text.find(".", start_idx)
start_idx, end_idx, text[start_idx:end_idx+1]

# Compute offsets using accumulation
offsets = []
offset = 0
for i,l in enumerate(lines):
    # line content spans from offset to offset+len(l)
    offsets.append((i, offset, offset+len(l)))
    # add 1 for newline except maybe last line; but splitlines removed '\n' so each line except last had '\n'
    offset += len(l) + 1  # assume '\n' present; verify last char
# print first 15
offsets[:15], len(text)

citations = []

# 1) Hadith content span
start_idx = text.find("إن الله كتب مقادير الخلائق")
end_idx = text.find(".", start_idx) + 1  # include period
span_text = text[start_idx:end_idx]
citations.append({
    "span_start": start_idx,
    "span_end": end_idx,
    "span_text": span_text,
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

# Lines which are likely Aya quotes: indices 2,3,4,5,6,8,9,10,11
aya_line_indices = [2,3,4,5,6,8,9,10,11]
for i in aya_line_indices:
    start, end = offsets[i][1], offsets[i][2]
    span_text = text[start:end]
    citations.append({
        "span_start": start,
        "span_end": end,
        "span_text": span_text,
        "citation_type": "Aya",
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": {},
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": "خطأ",
        "completely_invalid": True
    })

len(citations), citations[0], citations[-1]

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
